title: Gnome scales from Gnome cards in hand

card.rawText: For every card in your hand with "Gnome" in its name, add: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

effect.value: Atk Dice Rolls +1 and Modifier +1 per Gnome card

plan.title: Gnome scales from Gnome cards in hand
plan.summary: Put one Gnome card in hand while Gnome is primary and verify the printed per-Gnome attack dice and modifier bonuses apply once.

notes: Set Gnome as player_1 primary and keep one Gnome card in player_1 hand for the name-count scaling effect.

steps: Set Gnome as player_1 primary creature.
Keep one Gnome card in player_1 hand.
Read Gnome's effective attack dice and modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: One Gnome in hand adds one attack die
One Gnome in hand adds one modifier

manualVerification: Confirm duplicate Gnome cards in hand each add one Atk Dice Roll and one Modifier.
riskNotes: Scaling statChanges are interpreted through the dynamic count layer only, so the per-card effect is not double-counted as a flat +1.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
